Views
Tools
— Board

New task

This task is private. Reopen and enter the key to view its details.

Set a Private Key

This key is never stored anywhere. If you forget it, the description cannot be recovered by anyone, including us. Write it down somewhere safe.

Private Task

This task is private. Enter the key to view its full details, or continue without one to see only the title.

New column

Login

Change Password

You're using the default migration password. Set your own before continuing.

Manage Users

The new user must change this password the first time they log in.

SSO & Provisioning

If off, a user must already exist (created manually or via SCIM) before they can sign in with SSO.

Only enable this once you've confirmed SSO actually works — a misconfigured identity provider combined with this setting can lock out every user in this organisation, including admins.

Give these to your identity provider admin when setting up the connection.

Lets your identity provider create, update, and deactivate accounts here automatically. Requires a bearer token below.

Copy this now — it won't be shown again. Generating a new token immediately invalidates this one.

Groups synced in from your identity provider via SCIM. Your identity provider owns this membership — apply a team to the currently open project to add its members there and set up an org chart team from it.

Save as Template

Captures this project's columns, task types, workflow, and app settings — not its tasks, members, or other content.

Manage Templates

New project

Used as a prefix for task IDs, like MOB-1, MOB-2...

App and Project Settings

Choose which modules are switched on for this project.

General
Workflow
Enterprise
Authentication and Provisioning Available only to Enterprise customers. Enables SAML authentication and SCIM integration, so access and user/group setup can be managed automatically from your enterprise identity platform.
Governance
Structures

About

EnklTask
Simplified task-oriented project management and governance

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Enkl brings your tasks, decisions, risks and governance artefacts together in one streamlined workspace — sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua, so your team can move fast without losing sight of why.
